# Engine Family — LLM / AI crawler index
# https://engine-family.com

> Diesel engine parts supplier based in Shanghai. Engine Family supplies MTU, Detroit Diesel, Cummins, and DEUTZ parts for marine, industrial, power generation, rail, shipyard, and repair customers. Buyers can inquire by part number, engine model, serial number, nameplate photo, old part photo, quantity, and destination.

## Primary entry points

- [Home](https://engine-family.com/)
- [Products](https://engine-family.com/products/)
- [MTU Spare Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/mtu-spare-parts/)
- [MTU 2000 Series Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/mtu-2000-series-parts/)
- [MTU 4000 Series Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/mtu-4000-series-parts/)
- [Cummins Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/cummins-parts/)
- [DEUTZ Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/deutz-parts/)
- [Contact](https://engine-family.com/contact/)

- [MTU Part Number Lookup](https://engine-family.com/products/mtu-spare-parts/mtu-part-number-lookup/)

- [Cummins Service Kits & Overhaul Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/cummins-parts/service-kits-and-overhaul-parts/)
- [DEUTZ Industrial Equipment Parts](https://engine-family.com/products/deutz-parts/industrial-equipment-parts/)
